Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Request Payment and Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time it takes Payment Handled after the execution of Request Payment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in cases that previously experienced Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time to Payment Handled grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The sum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Payment Handled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled to be done in successful variants versus variants with at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled across all re-submitted cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Request Payment to Payment Handled in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER compared to those that bypass PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to the Payment Handled after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum resolution time of Payment Handled in cases where the process included a rejection by PRE_APPROVER followed by re-submission
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Payment Handled in the variant: Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE -> Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER -> Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR -> Request Payment -> Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'
